abilities.name: Cursed Omen
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may remove a Numb token from an enemy model within 6" to reduce that damage by 1.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Frenzied Charge
abilities.text: This model may Charge while engaged and ignore the once per activation restriction on Charge.

triggers.name: Frosted Veins
triggers.text: Models damaged by this action gain a Numb token.

triggers.name: Raking Pass
triggers.text: When resolving, deal 1 damage to enemy models this model moved through.

triggers.name: Grab On
triggers.text: Target gains a Slow token. End this model's activation.

triggers.name: Revealed in Agony
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Dark Messenger
actions.effects: Make a Remains marker within range. Enemy models within (aura)2" of the made marker must pass a TN 13 Wp duel or gain a Numb token.

triggers.name: Secret Beneath the Rib
triggers.text: Place the top card of this model's discard pile on top of its fate deck.

triggers.name: Magician's Secret
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the made marker.

actions.name: Tap the Leyline
actions.effects: Draw two cards and then discard one card.
